0.details:
Lack of communication between us to covid-19 and travel restrictions
Finally found a new job after years of piece jobs and learnerships
Working cities away from home and everyone else
Proud of your achievements and spotlight
Friends catch up trip to be considered
0.model_generation:
Dear friends,

I hope you’re all doing well after the whirlwind of the past years. I know our conversations stalled under the weight of COVID-19 and travel restrictions, but I’ve thought of you often. I’m excited to share that after years of various piece jobs and learnerships, I finally landed a full-time role in San Francisco. The past decade has been a winding journey, and this opportunity feels like the culmination of so many late nights and learning curves.

Living and working so far from home has been both thrilling and challenging. I’m proud of how far I’ve come and grateful for every milestone, big and small. Now that life is settling into a new rhythm, I’d love to plan a friends catch-up trip—somewhere we can all reconnect and celebrate together.

Let me know your thoughts and possible dates. I can’t wait to see you all again.

Warmly,
Sarah
0.final_version:
Dear friend ;) 

I hope you’re doing well after the whirlwind of the past years. I know our conversations have been lacking due to the unforeseen circumstances brought to us both by COVID-19 and the extreme travel restrictions it came with. Be that as it may, I’ve thought about you so many times and am excited to share that after years of various piece jobs and learnerships, I finally landed a full-time role in Tokyo. The past decade hasn't been easy to live and thrive in; hence this opportunity feels like the light you see right at end of a tunnel after a long period of darkness. 

Living and working so far from home has been both thrilling and challenging. I’m proud of how far I’ve come and grateful for every milestone, big and small. Now that life has gone back to its old self, I’d like us to plan a simple catch-up trip, maybe in Ibiza or Cape Town depending on our budget of course. 

Let me know your thoughts on this and when you think you'll be available. Hope to hear from and see you soon buddy!

Much love
Jabbs

1.details:
Unforeseen circumstances on your birthday
Family member had been battling terminal illness
Emergency call the not before your celebration day
Gifts shall continue to be delivered to you
Apology over lunch or a night out
1.model_generation:
Dear Friend,

I want to offer my sincerest apologies for missing your birthday celebration. On that day, I received an urgent call about a family member who has been bravely battling a terminal illness. The situation demanded my immediate attention, and I was unable to reach out before your special day. I deeply regret letting you down and not being there to share in your joy.

As a small gesture of my love and appreciation, I’ve arranged a few gifts that will be delivered to you over the coming days. I hope they brighten your week and remind you how much you mean to me.

When you feel ready, I would love to take you out for lunch or an evening dinner—my treat—to apologize in person and properly celebrate you. Please let me know what time works best.

Your friendship means so much to me.

With heartfelt regret and warm wishes,

Sincerely,
1.final_version:
Dear Friend,

I want to offer my sincerest apologies for missing your birthday celebration. On that day, I received an urgent call about a family member who has been bravely battling a terminal illness. The situation demanded me to immediately be with my family for comfort and support. I was unable to reach out before your special day. I deeply apologize for letting you down and not being there to share your joy as you'd normally do for me. 

As a small gesture of my love and appreciation, I’ve arranged a few gifts that will be delivered to you over the coming days. I hope they brighten your week and remind you how much you mean to me.

Furthermore, I would love to take you out for lunch or an evening dinner (my treat) to apologize in person and properly celebrate you in style! Please let me know what time works best.

Yours in friendship,
Jabbs

edits.removed: my immediate attention as my family also needed my presence

Your friendship means so much to me.

With heartfelt regret and warm wishes,

2.details:
A long journey from our preschool days
From humble beginnings to fruitful rewards like this one
Same discipline in this new milestone of marriage
Blessings and prosperous life to you and yours
2.model_generation:
From our first days building block towers in preschool classrooms to this moment, standing here before friends and family, our journey has been marked by laughter, curiosity, and unwavering friendship. Together, we transformed humble beginnings into dreams realized, nurturing hopes that have blossomed into the love we celebrate today.

I vow to carry the same discipline that guided our studies and our shared adventures into this new milestone of marriage. I promise to listen with patience, to encourage your ambitions, and to stand by your side through every challenge and triumph. May our partnership remain rooted in respect, honesty, and kindness.

As we embark on this next chapter, I offer you my gratitude and devotion. I look forward to building a life filled with joy and hope. May blessings and prosperity follow us, and may our love inspire all who share our path. Here’s to us today and every tomorrow.
2.final_version:
From our first days building block towers in preschool classrooms to this moment, standing here before friends and family, our journey has been marked by laughter, curiosity, and unwavering friendship. Together, we transformed humble beginnings into dreams realized, nurturing hopes that have blossomed into the love we celebrate today.

I vow to carry the same discipline that guided our studies and our shared adventures into this new milestone of marriage. I promise to listen with patience, to encourage your ambitions, and to stand by your side through every challenge and triumph. May our partnership remain rooted in respect, honesty, and kindness.

As we embark on this next chapter, I offer you my gratitude and devotion. I look forward to building a life filled with joy and hope. May blessings and prosperity follow us. May our love inspire all who share our path. Here’s to us today and every tomorrow, to more life and more blessings

3.details:
Our funny first conversation at a football match
Lived life to the fullest even against all odds
Always Left a mark in everyone
Life without you, a caring comedian friend
I gained an angel, may you rest in peace
3.model_generation:
Dear Family and Friends,

I was deeply saddened to hear of her passing. I still remember our first conversation at that football match—the way her laughter echoed every time she joked about the referee’s questionable calls. She approached life with a fearless spirit, embracing each moment even when the odds seemed against her. Her warmth and humor left a mark on everyone she met, turning ordinary days into cherished memories. Losing such a caring comedian leaves a void that words cannot fill. Though her presence is now gone, the joy she brought and the lessons she taught will remain in our hearts forever. I take comfort in knowing I have gained an angel whose smile will guide me through dark times. May she rest in peace, and may we honor her legacy by living our lives with the same courage and laughter she gifted us.

With love and sympathy,
3.final_version:
Dear Family and Friends,

I am deeply saddened to hear of the passing of Criselda. I cannot image the pain you all must be feeling right now. I still remember our first conversation at that football match, the way her laughter echoed every time she joked about the referee’s questionable calls. She approached life with a fearless spirit, embracing each moment even when the odds seemed against her. Her warm heart and humor left a mark on everyone she met, turning ordinary days into cherished memories. 

Losing such a caring comedian leaves a void that words cannot fill. Though her presence is now gone, the joy she brought and the lessons she taught will remain in my heart forever. I take comfort in knowing I have gained an angel whose smile will guide me through dark times. May she rest in peace, and may we honor her legacy by living our lives with the same courage and laughter she gifted us.

With love and sympathy,
Jabbs

4.details:
To you Mark, a true friend indeed
From taking me in as a mentor, to now a friend
Your lessons, ambition and passion for this profession
Grateful for both our achievements and long friendship
4.model_generation:
Dear Mark,

From the day you welcomed me as a mentee, you’ve exemplified true friendship. Your unwavering ambition, boundless passion, and steadfast generosity have guided me through every professional milestone. Each lesson you shared—from mastering the intricacies of our work to embracing bold new ideas—has shaped my growth and fueled my own determination.

Together, we’ve celebrated successes and faced challenges head-on, accumulating achievements I once only dreamed possible. Beyond professional victories, our long-standing camaraderie has been a constant source of joy and support. I am continually inspired by your expertise and uplifted by your belief in my potential.

Thank you for investing your time, wisdom, and encouragement so freely. Your mentorship laid the foundation for my progress, and your friendship has made every triumph all the more meaningful. I look forward to many more years of shared goals, laughter, and continued success.

With heartfelt gratitude,
Your friend
4.final_version:
Dear Mark,

Words cannot express how much I appreciate the true friend I have found myself in you. That feeling of bumping into you for the first on a random Friday afternoon never left, because of the change you left in me when we went our separate ways that day. The way you took me in without questioning my being, to later becoming my best friend, I will truly always cherish it.  

I sometimes question myself about where or who would I have become had it not been for the lessons, ambition and passion you instilled in me for the work we do. What you instilled in me does not only benefit me, but hundreds of us in our line of duty as I made it my mission to pass on the knowledge and wisdom you cemented in me to others in our field, and beyond. I will forever be indebted to you for all the achievements we reached together, and for all these long fruitful years of our friendship. 

Thanks a million, and more!

Yours in friendship!
Jabbs

5.details:
On the loss of your spouse
Words are not enough to express how sorry I am
Through you two, I witnessed love at first sight
May you never lose hope in God
I am with you for as long as you need me
God will restore your joy and happiness, dear friend
5.model_generation: Words cannot express how deeply sorry I am for the loss of your beloved spouse. Watching the two of you together was like witnessing love at first sight—your connection was a testament to the beauty of true devotion. In this time of profound sorrow, may your faith in God be a steadfast source of comfort and strength. Please know that I am here for you, offering my support, my prayers, and my shoulder to lean on for as long as you need me. I have faith that, in His time, God will restore your joy and fill your heart with peace again. Your spouse’s memory will always shine brightly in our hearts, a reminder of the love you shared. You are not alone, dear friend—may you feel wrapped in the warmth of God’s grace and the caring embrace of those who hold you close.
5.final_version:
Dear Moss,

I know losing your spouse hasn't been easy to deal with, and I want you to know that I deeply understand and acknowledge your pain. Words will never be enough to express how sorry I am for your loss, and I hope you know that me and Selina are only a phone call or drive away if you ever need a shoulder cry on or give you a hug. 

I see your pain and moments of disconnect from the real world when you are sitting with us, and believe you me all of us understand and wish we could take your pain away and wipe your tears off. I personally knew how much you loved each other as I witnessed love at first sight through you and Mariana and am grateful to have been afforded a chance to know you both and learn so much from your union. 

Selina and I are here for as long as you need us, be it day or night, never lose any hope or trust in God. Keep the same belief in hm as he did this not to break you but to free her from pain and gain you a guardian angel. Keep your faith in and trust him to restore your joy and happiness.

post_survey.present_other: Not really, I am comfortable with it as is.
post_survey.feedback: It was an interesting study and shifted my mind a bit on the use of AI in the future.
